# Reliabilism in epistemology

**Node Type:** synthesis
**Node ID:** 29490890-24bd-4257-8a96-2293a523ea84
**Depth:** 5
**Terminal:** No

**Parent:** [Can an infinite regress of justification ever be completed?](can-an-infinite-regress-of-justification-ever-be-completed-antithesis-e4f1f290-77a3-454b-ada7-4b506de74f54.md)

## Content

**A belief is justified if it is produced by a reliable cognitive process**, **A cognitive process is reliable if it produces true beliefs more often than not**, **Knowledge is a true belief generated by a reliable process**, **An infinite series of justifications is not required if a belief is reliably generated**
